name: zenithmc-host
description: ZenithMC host app — launches Minecraft servers and bridges them to friends over a direct P2P link.

scripts.check: node --check src/index.mjs && node --check src/mcServer.mjs && node --check src/registry.mjs && node --check src/proxy.mjs && node --check src/backend.mjs && node --check src/analytics.mjs
